title: TSMC Is Now Pushing to Solve One of the Biggest Constraints For the AI Industry Through Massive Investments in Taiwan and the US
description: One of the biggest supply constraints the AI industry faces is with advanced packaging, and given that every entity relies on TSMC, it appears the firm is gearing up to add significant capacity. TSMC's Advanced Packaging Supply Constraints Force the Firm to Rapidly Add New Capacity, or Risk Losing Customers We have discussed advanced packaging (AP) bottlenecks extensively on the website, but it is important to note that without adding new capacity, there is no other way to solve this bottleneck in the future. Based on a new report by Taiwan's CNA, it appears that TSMC is now ready to [...]

title: SPAN Announces XFRA, a Distributed Data Center Solution to Close the Speed-to-Power Gap for AI Compute Demand
description: SAN FRANCISCO--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Today SPAN announced the launch of XFRA, a distributed data center solution designed to deliver gigawatts of new compute capacity amidst today’s growing power infrastructure constraints. Comprising a distributed network of compute nodes located in residential and small commercial spaces, XFRA enables both the immediate and future compute needs of hyperscalers, neoscalers and AI cloud providers. Initial launch partners include NVIDIA, the world leader in AI comput

title: 2 attorneys charged, 3rd faces discipline by State Bar of California for misusing artificial intelligence
description: The State Bar of California is charging two attorneys with submitting false and inaccurate court filings produced using generative artificial intelligence without proper review. In a third case, the State Bar Court Hearing Department approved a disciplinary stipulation for an attorney who was sanctioned by a federal court for submitting citations and quotes from decisions that were nonexistent. A media [...]

title: Neoclassic Capital's Michael Bucella on what industries are poised for success amid AI demand surge
description: Michael Bucella, Neoclassic Capital co-founder and managing partner, joins 'Power Lunch' to discuss whether compute supply can meet AI demand, building new AI infrastructure, and more.

title: Is Meta building an AI version of Mark Zuckerberg that employees can actually talk to? Here's what we know so far
description: Meta AI Mark Zuckerberg clone: Meta is reportedly developing a photorealistic AI version of Mark Zuckerberg that employees could interact with, designed to mirror his voice, tone, and ideas. The project aims to make workers feel more connected to leadership and is part of Meta’s broader push into AI, alongside concerns over safety and ethics.
